title: delete should be avoided on arrays
description: "delete" should not be used on arraysAnalyze your codeintentionality-clearmaintainabilityCode Smelltype-dependentWhy is this an issue?More InfoThedeleteoperator can be used to remove a property from any object. Arrays are objects, so thedeleteoperator can be used on them too.When you delete an element from an array using thedeletekeyword, it will remove the value but still leave behind an empty slot at that index. Therefore, a hole will be created in the array because the indexes won’t be shifted to reflect the deletion.
recommendation: Remove the problematic code and refactor as needed.

checks.message: Use Array.splice() instead of delete operator on arrays
Avoid using delete on array elements - use Array.splice() instead
